reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is 4.7% and 20-day momentum is 13.2%.

Volume confirmation is -8.4% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
Relative strength is 2.7% versus SPY over 5 days and 1.0% versus the sector ETF.
News signal is bearish with score 0.22, confidence 0.67, and 0.3 weighted articles across 3 sources.
GPT-5 article classification and company-news provider coverage rated the news flow bearish at 0.22, after adjusting for relevance, recency, source quality, and story concentration.
Evidence quality: 3 articles across 3 sources, 0.3 effective weighted articles, average relevance 0.76, average source quality 0.75, confidence 0.67.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC 0.02).
Overall model score is -0.009 with medium confidence.
